options.name: <pin_or_port_list>
options.description: List or collection of pins or ports

options.name: -clocks
options.description: List of clocks passing through the specified objects to which the constraint applies

options.name: -logical_stop_propagation
options.description: Stops the propagation of specified clocks passing through the specified objects

options.name: -negative
options.description: Positive phase filtered clocks pass through the specified objects

options.name: -positive
options.description: Negative phase filtered clocks pass through the specified objects

options.name: -stop
options.description: Applies clock sense to object types specified in type_list: {all clock data clock_source_data default_data}

options.name: -stop_propagation
options.description: Stops the propagation of specified clocks and clock source data paths passing through the specified objects
